changeSet.author: kai
changeSet.comment: Update user_lifecycle event_type enum to include USER_CREATE and align with Java enums
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE user_lifecycle MODIFY COLUMN event_type Enum8('USER_CREATE' = 1, 'USER_REGISTER' = 2, 'USER_LOGIN' = 3, 'CARD_ADDED' = 4, 'USER_DELETE' = 5, 'REGISTER' = 6, 'LOGIN' = 7, 'DELETE' = 8);

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE user_lifecycle MODIFY COLUMN event_type Enum8('REGISTER' = 1, 'LOGIN' = 2, 'CARD_ADDED' = 3, 'DELETE' = 4);
